MINUTES
(403/CWW) SANDRA BLAIR W/PET. ROBERT CASHMAN W/RESP. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, THE COURT ORDERS: THE MATTER IS SET FOR A CHAMBERS CONFERENCE ON THE ISSUES ON 11/10
/99 AT 3:00PM. PET ALLEGES, BUT THE COURT DID NOT WITNESS, THAT RESP THREATENED HER IN OPEN COURT. PET REQUEST TO HAVE INDEPENDENT WITNESS SWORN RE
THREAT IS DENIED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.  THREATENED HER IN OPEN COURT. PET REQUEST TO HAVE INDEPENDENT WITNESS SWORN RE
MINUTES
(403/CWW) SANDRA BLAIR W/PET, ROBERT CASHMAN W/RESP, BJ HERRAN, FCS. PARTIES MET IN CHAMBERS CONFERENCE WHICH WAS NOT REPORTED AFTER WHICH THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOW
ING ORDERS: THE FEE OWED TO DR. ROTH WAS PAID AND IS NO LONGER AN ISSUE. DR. ROTH IS RELIEVED AND SHALL BE REPLACED BY A NEW THERAPIST. RESP. TO
OF THE APPOINTMENT OF DR. ROTH AND THE FEE WHICH SHALL BE MODIFIED. RESP. TO PREPARE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DIANA PADILLA, CSR 	975.
